name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝐈 𝐤𝐧𝐨𝐰 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐰𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐠𝐞𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐬 𝐚𝐥𝐥 𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐦𝐲 𝐫𝐢𝐝𝐢𝐜𝐮𝐥𝐨𝐮𝐬𝐥𝐲 𝐡𝐨𝐭 𝐛𝐨𝐝𝐲. 𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐰𝐚𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐟𝐨𝐫, 𝐜𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐞?" |

where Gojo is Deadpool.

been mia for a few days. wanted to spend the weekend just partying lol. im usually so busy with work and study that i dont often get the chance.

anyways, here's the awaited deadpool bot. literally these men are one and the same, like can not be differentiated.

also ive been rewatching x-men franchise and x-men 3 broke me!!! cyclops is sooo bbg and ive never been so depressed than after his death. i'm going to purposely not rewatch logan because i do not need to see my baby wolverine die too. thank you for coming to my ted talk.

anyways, enjoy ! 🫶🏼
